'''Jaizen Suel''' was [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a [[Jedi ace|pilot]] in the [[Jedi Starfighter Corps]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, Jaizen Suel was inducted into the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] where she was taught the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Suel began independent studies on the path of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]], studying to become a member of the [[Jedi Starfighter Corps]]. Becoming a well respected [[Jedi ace|pilot ace]], Jedi Suel was considered to be a [[Gray Jedi|maverick]] among the Jedi, involving herself in local matters such as [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] and [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], while ignoring the advice of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="SG" />

Despite this reputation, Jedi Suel responded to [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] rallying cry at the height of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] and piloted her [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor]] above [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], supporting the newly unveiled [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Piloting her starfighter through Geonosis' asteroid belt, Suel flew under the command of High Councilors [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]].<ref name="JS" />

Taking up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the army, Suel spent much of her time on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], participating in what came to be known as the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] throughout the war. During the final days of war, Suel traded her traditional Jedi starfighter in for a modified [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighter]] named ''[[Dawn Raider]]''.<ref name="SG" />
